reasoning_content:
Let me take a step back. I've been spending a lot of time on this. The task2 is an ANTLR parser that reads the output of task1 (a token dump format) and builds an AST. The original implementation already supports a subset of tokens and works for basic cases. 

Key issues:
1. The lexer needs all token types mapped (which I already did for SYsULexer.tokens and SYsULexer.cpp)
2. The parser grammar needs to be extended with more constructs
3. The Ast2Asg.cpp needs matching visitors

Given time constraints, let me restore the grammar to the original working state (which already gets 20%), extend only the token support, and try to get the score up incrementally.

Let me restore the grammar to the original and make minimal necessary changes.
